hero_tag: First Private Vacation Club in Europe web 3.0.
hero_desc: Your Membership is a <0>lifetime access</0> to a luxury resort — holidays at operating costs, completely <1>without hotel margins</1> and hidden fees.
model_desc: DAOResorts is a network of vacation resorts co-owned by their members. Each member holds a <0>Passport (NFT)</0>, giving guaranteed access to stays and a real share in decisions about the future of the place.
step_1_desc: You buy a Passport (NFT), which becomes your digital membership card.
step_2_desc: Every year you are guaranteed 14 days of stay in any house.
step_3_desc: You choose the date and pay only for cleaning and utilities.
benefit_1_text: 25 people share one house, drastically lowering costs.
benefit_2_text: You are not tied to one house — you book any available in the resort.
benefit_3_text: You can sell your Passport or pass it to family at any time.
booking_high_season_desc: Dates are assigned by algorithm. Participation in July one year lowers priority the next.
booking_off_season_desc: If the date is free, you book it instantly (First Come, First Served).
gov_desc: The community decides on-chain about key development aspects.
eco_desc: Model without margin. You only pay for operating costs.
footer_title: From code in Porto to foundations in Pszczew.
footer_desc: We connect the real world (Real World Assets) with Blockchain technology to ensure full transparency.
alloc_desc: Every penny is allocated with full transparency for the community.
alloc_1_desc: Direct funding of premium houses construction, infrastructure and amenities. Your investment builds real assets.
alloc_2_desc: Reserve for long-term maintenance, repairs and modernizations. Prestige guarantee for years.
alloc_3_desc: Project management, legal service, permits, marketing, team and ongoing operations.

project_silna_desc: Exclusive vacation resort located in the picturesque village of Silna. Experience luxury in nature with private lake access and breathtaking views.
project_feature_1: Relaxation and Warmth: Private jacuzzi and underfloor heating comfort in every house (all-year premium standard).
project_feature_2: Club Heart: Common restaurant – a meeting place for our community and shared DAO dinners.
project_feature_3: Wild Nature: Surrounded by dense forests and direct proximity to the lake (Pszczew at its best).
project_feature_4: Locality: Cooperation with regional suppliers, overseen personally within the 15% Management Fee.
